name: boltz-compute-cli
description: Codex plugin for Boltz Compute that gives agents six CLI-backed workflows for structure prediction, protein and small-molecule screening, de novo protein and small-molecule design, and recovery of job status and downloadable results. All skills invoke the boltz-api Go CLI directly; no Python runtime or SDK install is required.

interface.shortDescription: Run Boltz Compute structure prediction, screening, design, and job-recovery workflows via the boltz-api CLI.
interface.longDescription: Provides six Codex skills that drive the boltz-api Go CLI: structure and binding prediction, small-molecule library screening, small-molecule design, protein library screening, protein binder design, and job-status recovery. Each skill authors a YAML request body, runs estimate-cost and then start, and backgrounds download-results so polling and artifact download happen in one idempotent resumable step. Results land under ./boltz-experiments/<run-name>/ by default (override via BOLTZ_COMPUTE_OUTPUT_DIR).
defaultPrompt: Screen this compound library against my target protein and rank the hits.
Design peptide, nanobody, or antibody binders for this target epitope.
Check my Boltz jobs, tell me what finished, and download the results.
